title: Unit 03
wikitext:
[]: Unit 03!!!             Quote Post by DirtyHamster » Thu May 26, 2005 11:43 am DirtyHamsters got an itchin' which needs scratchin'? Two actually. 1. How the hell did the aircraft carrying Unit 03 takeoff & land? I mean, if you watch the end of episode 17 & beginning of episode 18 you can see Unit 03 dangling underneath the aircraft. Now as far as I know he Evas are 50 meters tall, minimum, so like......what the hell? Pilot 1: Hey man, something just occurred to me. How are we gonna land this thing :? ? We have a giant robot hanging on the bottom of the plane. Pilot 2: What do ya mean "how are we gonna land this thing?" We're gonna land the same way as we took off you idiot :x ! Pilot 1: Ehhh......How did we takeoff? Pilot 2: ......Ahhh Nuts :x ! (Wait wait, this itch is starting to really piss me off. Hold on a second. *scratch scratch scratch* Ohhh Yeah, That's Good. As for the itch on me back......screw it, I'll get it later.) Anyway. 2. When the 13th Angel was foung in Unit 03 why did it explode? And, why didn't the explosion destroy Unit 03? After all, it was a fairly humongous explosion. Bardiel: *BANG* Ahhh Ha Ha Ha , that scared the crap outta those Lilin. Now, where's this Adam dude everyone's talking about? (Now, time to kill this itch. I know I left a fork around here somewhere. Ahh there it is. :shock: Ooou, its got food on it......screw it. *scratch scratch scratch* Ohhh Yeah, That's Good.)

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Thu May 26, 2005 12:32 pm Umm its a cartoon, they used magic spells and pixie dust.

[]:             Quote Post by DirtyHamster » Thu May 26, 2005 12:40 pm Pixie Dust! Hmmm. Not quite the answer I expected. Pilot 1: Hey man, something just occurred to me. How are we gonna land this thing? Pilot 2: With Pixie Dust you idiot! What else? Jees Man! ...EDIT... Hey, Neon Genesis Evangelion (FairyLand style) All the Angels could be replaced with Fairies. Yeah, and you don't even need to change Kaworus character.

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Thu May 26, 2005 1:01 pm second question is easier to answer, Bardiel probably didn't explode. My guess is it expanded its AT field offensively annihalating everything around unit 3. Sort of like how Asuka uses her at field against the vot aircraft in end of eva except on a bigger scale. As for the airplane, maybe when they took off unit 3 was lying down at first and then was verticle only after they got in the air. As for a practical reason why they would carry an eva this way...uhhh...maybe that eva gets air sick if they carry her any other way...

[]:             Quote Post by DirtyHamster » Thu May 26, 2005 1:14 pm Ok, I don't know much about airodynamics. Hell, I can't even spell the word, but wouldn't Unit 03 cause a terrible drag on the plane makeing it unflyable? ...i know, i over read things. just amuse me.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu May 26, 2005 1:41 pm DirtyHamster wrote: Ok, I don't know much about airodynamics. Hell, I can't even spell the word, but wouldn't Unit 03 cause a terrible drag on the plane makeing it unflyable?

[]:             Quote Post by Oroboro » Thu May 26, 2005 1:55 pm Your asking about holes and technicalities from Evangelion?! Come on! You should know that out of all of the anime out there, Evangelion is the last one you should be asking yourself, "Hey, wait a sec. How'd that happen?" while watching. It's Eva. That's the explanation for everything in that show. The answer to life, the universe and everything isn't 42, contrary to what Adams said. The actual explanation of the unexplanable question is Neon Genesis Evangelion. Accept this and move on.

[]:             Quote Post by DirtyHamster » Thu May 26, 2005 2:08 pm Oh No, we're not going down the HHGtG road again, are we? Just after I made myself forget about yesterday. Stay back memories. I said STAY BACK. And plus, I don't think "It's Eva" is a good answer. This answer would have been better: As we know there are known knowns, there are things we know we know. We also know there are known unknowns. That is we know there are things we don't know. There are also unknown unknowns, the ones we don't know we don't know and the unknown unknowns that we'll never know.

[]:             Quote Post by rip3mwk » Thu May 26, 2005 3:53 pm I would suspect that there is no logical answer to this question. The most (and least) logical choice would be that it was lying on its back (or front... ouch) and was pulled to a vertical position. Now what I believe is the absolute truth: ahem, the animators at gainax decide, "Hey, wouldn't it be awsome if 03 was crucified? Hell Yes! Put 'er up on a giant red cross just like her momma, DO IT!" Eh and I have been a loyal fan for some time now :oops: but can someone explain: HHGtG

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu May 26, 2005 3:56 pm The Hitchhikers Guide To the Galaxy.

[]:             Quote Post by rip3mwk » Thu May 26, 2005 4:08 pm Well -- at least now I don't feel so ashamed.

[]: Re: Unit 03!!!             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Thu May 26, 2005 5:12 pm DirtyHamster wrote: 1. How the hell did the aircraft carrying Unit 03 takeoff & land? I mean, if you watch the end of episode 17 & beginning of episode 18 you can see Unit 03 dangling underneath the aircraft. Now as far as I know he Evas are 50 meters tall, minimum, so like......what the hell?

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Thu May 26, 2005 5:24 pm I would imagine that by posessing the body of Unit-03, Bardiel had given up some of its quasi immortal powers. It had become "more mortal" so to speak, and in so doing my have both lost abilities it had, namely giant explosions AND possibly big laser beams, etc. Also may have gained intentions and motivations it previously did not have. Consider that Bardiel seemingly attempts to posess Unit-00. Could it have been trying to reproduce? If it had been, wasn't it the only angel to do so? (Adam, Lilith, and possibly Iruel aside) Could its newly mortal flesh have been making previously unknown demands? Also Bardiel was not the only Angel not to explode.

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Thu May 26, 2005 5:38 pm Defectron wrote: Either way it seems to have been something that Bardial just kind of did on a whim and wasn't too intent on since all it took to make Bardial give up assimalating 00 was that arm getting blown off.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu May 26, 2005 5:55 pm ObsessiveMathsFreak wrote: Sychronisation was cut after the arm was severed. Perhaps Unit-00 had become considerably less attractive. At least Bardiel wasn't a necropihilliac!

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Thu May 26, 2005 6:51 pm Reichu wrote: Er... what? Synchronization being cut just means the pilot loses control; it hardly renders the Eva dead, it just means she can't move unless she does so herself. Why should Bardiel care about this? Ve was more interested in the physical Eva than whatever organism lurked within (= Rei II), otherwise ve would have poured verself into the entry plug area.

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Thu May 26, 2005 9:01 pm What I mean to say is that the it was the AT-Field that might have been attracting Bardiel. Rather like fireflys attracted to each others light. AT-Field as a kind of n-dimensional angel pheromone perhaps? In any case, one the Eva goes "dormant" Bardiel loses interest. Why is the question?

[]:             Quote Post by Soluzar » Thu May 26, 2005 9:22 pm Defectron wrote: What I mean to say is that the it was the AT-Field that might have been attracting Bardiel. Rather like fireflys attracted to each others light. AT-Field as a kind of n-dimensional angel pheromone perhaps? In any case, one the Eva goes "dormant" Bardiel loses interest. Why is the question?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu May 26, 2005 9:40 pm Soluzar wrote: This seems to have given her a slight degree of difference from the rest of the Eva series, although what it amounts to in practice is anyone's guess.

[]:             Quote Post by Oroboro » Thu May 26, 2005 10:21 pm I think you guys are getting a little too in-depth here. All of that was for artistic quality.
